tasks.subject: Task 0: Branch Setup and Dependencies
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create feature branch off dev and install required packages.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/server/package.json (via pnpm add)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Branch feat/vercel-ai-openrouter-migration exists off dev
- ai, @ai-sdk/openai, zod in apps/server/package.json
- pnpm install succeeds

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/server/package.json"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/server && node -e \"require('ai'); require('@ai-sdk/openai'); require('zod'); console.log('OK')\""}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Migrate generatePersona to streamText
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace aiClientService.chat() in generatePersona() with streamText(), update tests.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/common-staff.service.ts
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/common-staff.service.spec.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- generatePersona uses streamText from ai package with OpenRouter
- Model is anthropic/claude-3.5-haiku
- Temperature 0.9, maxTokens 1024
- All persona tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/common-staff.service.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/common-staff.service.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/server && npx jest --config apps/gateway/jest.config.cjs --testPathPattern common-staff.service.spec -- --verbose"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Migrate generateCandidates to streamObject
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace aiClientService.chat() + JSON-line parsing in generateCandidates() with streamObject() + Zod, update tests.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/common-staff.service.ts
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/common-staff.service.spec.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- generateCandidates uses streamObject with Zod schema
- Return type is AsyncGenerator<{ type: 'partial' | 'complete'; data: unknown }>
- No manual JSON buffer parsing
- All candidate tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/common-staff.service.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/common-staff.service.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/server && npx jest --config apps/gateway/jest.config.cjs --testPathPattern common-staff.service.spec -- --verbose"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Remove AiClientService from CommonStaffService
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Clean up unused AiClientService injection from CommonStaffService constructor and tests.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/common-staff.service.ts
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/common-staff.service.spec.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- AiClientService import removed from service
- AiClientService removed from constructor
- Mock removed from tests
- AiClientModule stays in ApplicationsModule
- All tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/common-staff.service.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/applications/common-staff.service.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/server && npx jest --config apps/gateway/jest.config.cjs --testPathPattern common-staff.service.spec -- --verbose"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Update Frontend generateCandidates Consumer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update frontend SSE consumer and UI handler for progressive partial objects.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/client/src/services/api/applications.ts
- Modify: apps/client/src/components/ai-staff/CreateCommonStaffDialog.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- generateCandidates returns partial/complete event types
- handleGenerateCandidates filters complete candidates from partial data
- Client type-check passes

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/services/api/applications.ts", "apps/client/src/components/ai-staff/CreateCommonStaffDialog.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/client && npx tsc --noEmit"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Final Verification and PR
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify full build, run all tests, create PR to dev.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- pnpm build:server succeeds
- All gateway tests pass
- Client type-check passes
- PR targeting dev created

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build:server && cd apps/server && npx jest --config apps/gateway/jest.config.cjs --verbose"}
```
